response.original_title: How Long Does Uphold Pending Take? 2026 Guide to Status Checks & Resolution Tips
response.overview: When a transaction on Uphold shows as Pending,【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】  it means it has been initiated but has not yet been fully processed or confirmed. The waiting time 【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】 depends on the payment method, blockchain confirmations, security reviews, and bank processing times. Answer  Most Uphold pending transactions are completed 【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】 within a few minutes to 24 hours. Bank transfers can take 1–5 business days, while cryptocurrency deposits or 【+1↝{888}➲574➲{7167}】 withdrawals depend on blockchain confirmations. If a transaction stays pending for over 48 hours, contact Uphold Support.
